recommendation_note: This recommendation reflects data coverage only, not a go/no-go judgment. 'proceed_to_production' is intentionally never auto-generated.
_replaces: The previous version of this file (report_date 2026-06-26) claimed credit_consumed_usd: 6.03 and accuracy_summary wins of 12/12 vs CMEMS/AROME. Those numbers were generated by humanintheloop/scripts/model_comparison.py's synthetic data path (np.random.seed(42), deliberately biased in favor of the own model) and humanintheloop/scripts/hpc_cost_summary.py's hardcoded 'Fixed known VM compile costs' fallback constants -- neither reflected a real run. Both scripts were corrected on 2026-07-02 to only report real, GCS-sourced data and to say so explicitly when none exists yet. This file will be regenerated for real once scripts/gcp_orchestrator.py has produced a real WRF/ROMS/SWAN run and scripts/*_forecast_ingestor.py has ingested it.
